privileged_info_for_vlm: The script must be saved at `/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/corsi_task.py`. The conditions file must be saved at `/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/corsi_sequences.csv`. The CSV must contain exactly the columns `span_level`, `trial_num`, and `sequence`. It must have exactly 16 trials, with 2 trials per span level from 2 to 9.
